topic: Choosing correct decimal operation for word problem
latex:
A recipe calls for $5.1$ grams of salt and $10.8$ grams of sugar. Which expression below represents the amount of salt and sugar, in grams, in the recipe in all?

\textbf{A.} $10.8 \times 5.1$

\textbf{B.} $10.8 - 5.1$

\textbf{C.} $10.8 \div 5.1$

\textbf{D.} $10.8 + 5.1$
